_description: Peng & Peng Chapter 5 style U-loop thermal expansion absorber — 6" SCH 40 carbon steel pipe, anchored at both ends, 50 bar internal pressure, 20→120°C thermal expansion. The U-loop absorbs thermal growth via bending in the perpendicular legs. This benchmark exercises: straight pipe in 2 directions, right-angle corners, sustained (weight + pressure), expansion (thermal only), B31.3 eq 23a and eq 17.
_reference: Peng, L.-C. & Peng, T.-L. (2009). Pipe Stress Engineering. ASME Press. Chapter 5 worked examples.
